# OneTimeBuyLineItem

**Object**

The line item that indicates a one-time charge transaction.

## Declaration

```swift
object OneTimeBuyLineItem
```

## Discussion

Use a `OneTimeBuyLineItem` to report a one-time charge transaction, or a correction to a one-time charge transaction that you previously submitted.

Each line-item object represents one transaction. Other types of line-item objects include:

- [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/SubscriptionBuyLineItem], for reporting subscription-related transactions
- [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/RefundLineItem], for reporting refunds

Include the line-item objects in the `lineItems` array of an [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/ExternalPurchaseReport] object. To send the report, include the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/ExternalPurchaseReport] object in a request to the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Send-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint.

For more information, see [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/reportwithtransactions] and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/reportcorrections].

## External purchase report transactions

- **Reporting tokens with transactions**: Create reports for external purchase tokens that result in completed transactions, including one-time charges, subscriptions and renewals, and refunds.
- **Reporting corrections**: Submit a report with corrections if you find errors in, or have adjustments to, a successfully submitted transaction.
- **RefundLineItem**: The line item that indicates a refund transaction.
- **SubscriptionBuyLineItem**: The line item that indicates a subscription-related event or transaction.
- **Line item fields**: Properties that describe a single transaction or correction in an external purchase report.
